name: @assforge/mimo-plugin-codex
description: MiMo Code plugin for Codex — delegate tasks, code reviews, and background work to MiMo (Xiaomi). Based on openai/codex-plugin-cc.
author: Xiaomi MiMo

scripts.version: changeset version && node scripts/sync-plugin-version.mjs && npm install --package-lock-only --ignore-scripts
